title: Property Consultant - Atul Projects - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Atul Projects - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
Atul Projects has an exciting opening for a Property Consultant at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Atul Projects:
Atul Projects is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Property Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Atul Projects!
